docket_entries.description: APPL & DECLARATION FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
FAMILY LAW ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-1998 AT 01:35 PM IN DEPT 403
FAMILY LAW ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: HEARING, CALENDAR MOTION: OTHER HEARING SET FOR APR-07-1998 AT 01:35 PM IN DEPT 404
(404)FINDING THAT NEITHER PARTY WAS PRESENT IN COURT AT THE CALLING OF THE CALENDAR, THE COURT ORDERED THIS MATTER OFF CALENDAR.(HERSH)
PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARGARET DEL COTO CSR# 8493
AMENDED APPLICATION AND DECL FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTICVIOLENCE
FAMILY LAW ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR MAY-05-1998 AT 01:35 PM IN DEPT 404
STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER KING MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEM BY PETITIONER IN PRO PER
(404)PERSON TO BE PROTECTED APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED DID NOT APPEAR. THE COURT FOUND THAT NOTICE HAD BEEN GIVEN AS REQUIRED BY LAW. THE C
OURT GRANTED A RESTRAINING ORDER THAT SHALL REMAIN IN EFFECT FOR THREE YEARS. PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED SHALL NOT CONTACT, MOLEST, ATTACK, STRIKE,
PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED SHALL STAY 100 YARDS FROM PERSON TO BE PROTECTED, PERSON TO BE PROTECTED'S RESIDENCE, AND PERSON TO BE PROTECTED'S WORKPLACE.
ON TO BE PROTECTED SHALL PUT ALL OF PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED'S BELONGINGS IN THE GARAGE. PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED MAY GO INTO THE GARAGE, WITH NOTICE,
PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY VERONICA MORI CSR # 7006
TO RETRIEVE HIS BELONGINGS. PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED SHALL NOT ENTER THE RESIDENCE.  (KING)ERSON TO BE RESTRAINED MAY GO INTO THE GARAGE, WITH NOTICE,
RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING MICROFILMED REEL/BATCH F: 253-03
